name: Zippy Soybean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can tomatoes with chili peppers (16 oz.)
1 cup soft whole wheat bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Arrange beans and corn in alternate layers in a 2-quart baking dish.
3. Mash tomatoes with a fork; set aside 2 tablespoons tomato juice.
4. Mix flour and seasonings and stir into the tomato juice.
5. Stir the flour mixture into the tomatoes and add green pepper.
6. Heat until the mixture comes to a boil.
7. Pour the hot sauce over the vegetables.
8. Mix bread crumbs, cheese, and margarine; sprinkle over the vegetables.
9. Bake for about 20 minutes until browned.
